summary: Magical second set with Peggy‑O, Bird Song & Stella Blue highlights
blurb: The first set starts somberly but gives way to a sublime second set featuring Peggy‑O, Wang Dang Doodle, Bird Song, Space and Stella Blue. Jerry’s vocal on Peggy‑O is touching while Phil’s bass drives the intensity. The soundboard recording captures the performance with crisp clarity despite minor drop‑outs.
review: On October 28, 1991 at the Oakland‑Alameda County Coliseum the Grateful Dead delivered a show that began with a restrained first set – Bertha, Greatest Story Ever Told and a plaintive Peggy‑O – before launching into an emotionally charged second half. The highlight reel includes a heartfelt rendition of Peggy‑O, a rollicking Wang Dang Doodle, soaring Bird Song, the exploratory Space jam and a soulful Stella Blue that closes the set with lingering melancholy. Jerry Garcia’s vocals on Peggy‑O are described as “touching,” and his guitar work throughout is praised as superb; Phil Lesh provides a “flame‑breathed” bass foundation that fuels the second‑set intensity. With Bruce Hornsby and Vince Welnick adding tasteful keyboards, and the dual drummers keeping a steady pulse, the evening stands out as one of the stronger 1991 outings, especially captured on the pristine soundboard source.

rating_calculation.sentiment_rationale: Two recordings (soundboard and unknown source) express clear positive sentiment, praising the second set and specific songs; a third recording is mixed but offers no criticism. Consistent praise across multiple sources warrants a moderate positive adjustment.

best_recording.reason: Pristine soundboard capture with clear instrument separation and minimal glitches, showcasing the magical second set.

key_highlights: Sublime second set that many describe as sublime and unifying
Jerry’s vocal delivery on Peggy‑O is touching; superb guitar work throughout
Phil’s “flame‑breathed” bass drives the intensity of the latter half
Pristine soundboard recording despite a few minor drop‑outs

band_performance.Jerry: Garcia’s vocal delivery on Peggy‑O is touching and his guitar work throughout the show is praised as superb.
band_performance.Phil: Lesh’s bass is described as “flame‑breathed”, driving the intensity of the second set.
